title: Winnipeg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Winnipeg with a Z-Score of -4.51. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 16.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53% and wind speed is approximately 1.2 km/h. 
 The cold snap has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily operations.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
